propositions: The retired config flag require_signature_for_close and its close-gate code must be removed since it was never used in this project.
The functions resolve_signature_gate and _signature_gate, plus transition_core plumbing and the story/epic close-gate block, should be deleted along with the config field and validator.
The shared HMAC signing/attestation substrate (signing.py, attestations map, MCP signing tools) must be preserved and keep working.
The completion-verifier close path and plan-review claim gate depend on shared signing machinery and must remain functional.
The --force-close and --verdict-hash options are not owned by this gate and must be kept unaffected.
True-path tests must be removed or rewritten and golden CLI help regenerated after removal.
